title: AliExpress hit with record $625M fine after failing to make EU-ordered fixes
summary: EC testing found that “a high volume of illegal products”—including unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics—“continued to circulate despite AliExpress’ moderation efforts.” In June 2025, AliExpress was ordered to bring its platform into compliance with the DSA but failed to make the necessary…
